sEn: Mistral 7B outperforms larger models like Llama 2 13B and Llama 1 34B in reasoning, math, and code, using efficient attention mechanisms.
sZh: Mistral 7B 在推理、数学和代码生成上超越 Llama 2 13B 和 Llama 1 34B，采用分组查询注意力和滑动窗口注意力实现高效推理。
absEn: We introduce Mistral 7B v0.1, a 7-billion-parameter language model engineered for superior performance and efficiency. Mistral 7B outperforms Llama 2 13B across all evaluated benchmarks, and Llama 1 34B in reasoning, mathematics, and code generation. Our model leverages grouped-query attention (GQA) for faster inference, coupled with sliding window attention (SWA) to effectively handle sequences of arbitrary length with a reduced inference cost. We also provide a model fine-tuned to follow instructions, Mistral 7B -- Instruct, that surpasses the Llama 2 13B -- Chat model both on human and automated benchmarks. Our models are released under the Apache 2.0 license.
absZh: 我们推出了 Mistral 7B v0.1，一个拥有70亿参数的语言模型，旨在实现卓越的性能和效率。Mistral 7B 在所有评估基准上均优于 Llama 2 13B，并在推理、数学和代码生成方面超越 Llama 1 34B。我们的模型采用分组查询注意力（GQA）实现更快的推理，并结合滑动窗口注意力（SWA）以降低推理成本，有效处理任意长度的序列。我们还提供了一个经过微调以遵循指令的模型 Mistral 7B – Instruct，它在人工和自动化基准测试中均超越了 Llama 2 13B – Chat 模型。我们的模型在 Apache 2.0 许可下发布。

contrib.en: Introduces Mistral 7B, a 7B-parameter model outperforming Llama 2 13B on all benchmarks and Llama 1 34B on reasoning, math, and code.
contrib.zh: 提出Mistral 7B，一个70亿参数模型，在所有基准测试中超越Llama 2 13B，并在推理、数学和代码方面超越Llama 1 34B。

contrib.en: Leverages grouped-query attention (GQA) for faster inference and sliding window attention (SWA) for efficient long sequence handling.
contrib.zh: 利用分组查询注意力（GQA）加速推理，滑动窗口注意力（SWA）高效处理长序列。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that a smaller model can achieve performance comparable to much larger models, compressing knowledge more than previously thought.
contrib.zh: 证明较小模型能达到与更大模型相当的性能，知识压缩程度超出先前认知。

contrib.en: Provides Mistral 7B – Instruct, a fine-tuned chat model surpassing Llama 2 13B – Chat on human and automated benchmarks.
contrib.zh: 提供Mistral 7B – Instruct微调聊天模型，在人工和自动基准上超越Llama 2 13B – Chat。

contrib.en: Introduces rolling buffer cache and pre-fill chunking to reduce memory usage and improve inference efficiency.
contrib.zh: 引入滚动缓冲区缓存和预填充分块，减少内存使用并提升推理效率。

contrib.en: Releases models under Apache 2.0 license with reference implementation for easy deployment.
contrib.zh: 以Apache 2.0许可证发布模型，附带参考实现便于部署。

limits.en: Performance on knowledge benchmarks shows lower compression rate (1.9x) due to limited parameter count.
limits.zh: 知识基准性能压缩率较低（1.9倍），受限于参数数量。

limits.en: Evaluation protocol differences may affect direct comparison with Llama 2 results on some benchmarks.
limits.zh: 评估协议差异可能影响与Llama 2在某些基准上的直接比较。

limits.en: Safety evaluation uses a limited set of 175 unsafe prompts; real-world robustness may vary.
limits.zh: 安全评估仅使用175个不安全提示，实际鲁棒性可能不同。

limits.en: Sliding window attention theoretical span of 131K tokens may not be fully utilized in practice.
limits.zh: 滑动窗口注意力理论跨度131K词元在实践中可能无法充分利用。

limits.en: Fine-tuned instruct model is a preliminary demonstration; no proprietary data or training tricks used.
limits.zh: 微调指令模型仅为初步演示，未使用专有数据或训练技巧。

items.en: We introduce Mistral 7B, a 7–billion-parameter language model engineered for superior performance and efficiency. Mistral 7B outperforms the best open 13B model (Llama 2) across all evaluated benchmarks, and the best released 34B model (Llama 1) in reasoning, mathematics, and code generation. Our model leverages grouped-query attention (GQA) for faster inference, coupled with sliding window attention (SWA) to effectively handle sequences of arbitrary length with a reduced inference cost. We also provide a model fine-tuned to follow instructions, Mistral 7B – Instruct, that surpasses Llama 2 13B – chat model both on human and automated benchmarks. Our models are released under the Apache 2.0 license. Code: https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-src Webpage: https://mistral.ai/news/announcing-mistral-7b/
items.zh: 我们推出了Mistral 7B，一个70亿参数的语言模型，专为卓越性能和效率而设计。Mistral 7B在所有评估基准上均优于最佳的开源130亿参数模型（Llama 2），并在推理、数学和代码生成方面超越了最佳已发布的340亿参数模型（Llama 1）。我们的模型利用分组查询注意力（GQA）实现更快的推理，并结合滑动窗口注意力（SWA）以降低推理成本，有效处理任意长度的序列。我们还提供了一个经过微调以遵循指令的模型Mistral 7B – Instruct，它在人工和自动化基准上均超越了Llama 2 13B – chat模型。我们的模型在Apache 2.0许可下发布。代码：https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-src 网页：https://mistral.ai/news/announcing-mistral-7b/

items.en: In the rapidly evolving domain of Natural Language Processing (NLP), the race towards higher model performance often necessitates an escalation in model size. However, this scaling tends to increase computational costs and inference latency, thereby raising barriers to deployment in practical, real-world scenarios. In this context, the search for balanced models delivering both high-level performance and efficiency becomes critically essential. Our model, Mistral 7B, demonstrates that a carefully designed language model can deliver high performance while maintaining an efficient inference. Mistral 7B outperforms the previous best 13B model (Llama 2, touvron2023llama2 ) across all tested benchmarks, and surpasses the best 34B model (LLaMa 34B, touvron2023llama ) in mathematics and code generation. Furthermore, Mistral 7B approaches the coding performance of Code-Llama 7B roziere2023code , without sacrificing performance on non-code related benchmarks.
items.zh: 在快速发展的自然语言处理（NLP）领域，追求更高模型性能通常需要扩大模型规模。然而，这种Scaling往往会增加计算成本和推理延迟，从而提高了在实际场景中部署的门槛。在此背景下，寻找兼具高性能和高效率的平衡模型变得至关重要。我们的模型Mistral 7B表明，精心设计的语言模型可以在保持高效推理的同时实现高性能。Mistral 7B在所有测试基准上均优于之前最佳的130亿参数模型（Llama 2, touvron2023llama2），并在数学和代码生成方面超越了最佳的340亿参数模型（LLaMa 34B, touvron2023llama）。此外，Mistral 7B在编码性能上接近Code-Llama 7B roziere2023code，同时不牺牲非代码相关基准的性能。

items.en: Mistral 7B leverages grouped-query attention (GQA) ainslie2023gqa , and sliding window attention (SWA) child2019generating ; beltagy2020longformer . GQA significantly accelerates the inference speed, and also reduces the memory requirement during decoding, allowing for higher batch sizes hence higher throughput, a crucial factor for real-time applications. In addition, SWA is designed to handle longer sequences more effectively at a reduced computational cost, thereby alleviating a common limitation in LLMs. These attention mechanisms collectively contribute to the enhanced performance and efficiency of Mistral 7B.
items.zh: Mistral 7B利用了分组查询注意力（GQA）ainslie2023gqa和滑动窗口注意力（SWA）child2019generating; beltagy2020longformer。GQA显著加快了推理速度，并减少了解码过程中的内存需求，从而支持更高的批量大小和更高的吞吐量，这是实时应用的关键因素。此外，SWA旨在以更低的计算成本更有效地处理更长的序列，从而缓解了LLM中的常见限制。这些注意力机制共同促进了Mistral 7B性能和效率的提升。

items.en: Mistral 7B is released under the Apache 2.0 license. This release is accompanied by a reference implementation111https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-src facilitating easy deployment either locally or on cloud platforms such as AWS, GCP, or Azure using the vLLM kwon2023efficient inference server and SkyPilot 222https://github.com/skypilot-org/skypilot. Integration with Hugging Face 333https://huggingface.co/mistralai is also streamlined for easier integration. Moreover, Mistral 7B is crafted for ease of fine-tuning across a myriad of tasks. As a demonstration of its adaptability and superior performance, we present a chat model fine-tuned from Mistral 7B that significantly outperforms the Llama 2 13B – Chat model.
items.zh: Mistral 7B在Apache 2.0许可下发布。此次发布附带一个参考实现111https://github.com/mistralai/mistral-src，便于在本地或云平台（如AWS、GCP或Azure）上使用vLLM kwon2023efficient推理服务器和SkyPilot 222https://github.com/skypilot-org/skypilot进行部署。与Hugging Face 333https://huggingface.co/mistralai的集成也得以简化。此外，Mistral 7B易于针对多种任务进行微调。作为其适应性和卓越性能的证明，我们展示了一个从Mistral 7B微调而来的聊天模型，其性能显著优于Llama 2 13B – Chat模型。

items.en: Mistral 7B takes a significant step in balancing the goals of getting high performance while keeping large language models efficient. Through our work, our aim is to help the community create more affordable, efficient, and high-performing language models that can be used in a wide range of real-world applications.
items.zh: Mistral 7B在平衡高性能与保持大型语言模型效率的目标上迈出了重要一步。通过我们的工作，我们旨在帮助社区创建更经济、高效且高性能的语言模型，使其能够广泛应用于各种实际场景。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Sliding Window Attention. The number of operations in vanilla attention is quadratic in the sequence length, and the memory increases linearly with the number of tokens. At inference time, this incurs higher latency and smaller throughput due to reduced cache availability. To alleviate this issue, we use sliding window attention: each token can attend to at most W𝑊W tokens from the previous layer (here, W=3𝑊3W=3). Note that tokens outside the sliding window still influence next word prediction. At each attention layer, information can move forward by W𝑊W tokens. Hence, after k𝑘k attention layers, information can move forward by up to k×W𝑘𝑊k\times W tokens.
items.capZh: 图1：滑动窗口注意力。标准注意力中的操作次数与序列长度呈二次关系，内存随token数量线性增加。在推理时，这会导致更高的延迟和更低的吞吐量，因为缓存可用性降低。为了缓解这一问题，我们使用滑动窗口注意力：每个token最多可以关注前一层中的W个token（此处W=3）。注意，滑动窗口外的token仍然影响下一个词预测。在每个注意力层，信息可以向前移动W个token。因此，经过k个注意力层后，信息最多可以向前移动k×W个token。

items.en: Mistral 7B is based on a transformer architecture vaswani2017attention . The main parameters of the architecture are summarized in Table 1. Compared to Llama, it introduces a few changes that we summarize below.
items.zh: Mistral 7B基于Transformer架构vaswani2017attention。架构的主要参数总结在表1中。与Llama相比，它引入了一些变化，我们总结如下。

items.en: Sliding Window Attention. SWA exploits the stacked layers of a transformer to attend information beyond the window size W𝑊W. The hidden state in position i𝑖i of the layer k𝑘k, hisubscriptℎ𝑖h_{i}, attends to all hidden states from the previous layer with positions between i−W𝑖𝑊i-W and i𝑖i. Recursively, hisubscriptℎ𝑖h_{i} can access tokens from the input layer at a distance of up to W×k𝑊𝑘W\times k tokens, as illustrated in Figure 1. At the last layer, using a window size of W=4096𝑊4096W=4096, we have a theoretical attention span of approximately 131​K131𝐾131K tokens. In practice, for a sequence length of 16K and W=4096𝑊4096W=4096, changes made to FlashAttention dao2022flashattention and xFormers xFormers2022 yield a 2x speed improvement over a vanilla attention baseline.
items.zh: 滑动窗口注意力。SWA利用Transformer的堆叠层来关注窗口大小W之外的信息。第k层位置i的隐藏状态h_i关注前一层中位置在i-W到i之间的所有隐藏状态。递归地，h_i可以访问输入层中距离最多W×k个token的token，如图1所示。在最后一层，使用窗口大小W=4096，我们拥有约131K token的理论注意力跨度。在实践中，对于16K的序列长度和W=4096，对FlashAttention dao2022flashattention和xFormers xFormers2022的修改相比标准注意力基线带来了2倍的速度提升。

items.en: Rolling Buffer Cache. A fixed attention span means that we can limit our cache size using a rolling buffer cache. The cache has a fixed size of W𝑊W, and the keys and values for the timestep i𝑖i are stored in position imodWmodulo𝑖𝑊i\bmod W of the cache. As a result, when the position i𝑖i is larger than W𝑊W, past values in the cache are overwritten, and the size of the cache stops increasing. We provide an illustration in Figure 2 for W=3𝑊3W=3. On a sequence length of 32k tokens, this reduces the cache memory usage by 8x, without impacting the model quality.
items.zh: 滚动缓冲区缓存。固定的注意力跨度意味着我们可以使用滚动缓冲区缓存来限制缓存大小。缓存具有固定大小W，时间步i的键和值存储在缓存的i mod W位置。因此，当位置i大于W时，缓存中的旧值被覆盖，缓存大小停止增长。我们在图2中给出了W=3的示例。在32k token的序列长度上，这使缓存内存使用减少了8倍，且不影响模型质量。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Rolling buffer cache. The cache has a fixed size of W=4𝑊4W=4. Keys and values for position i𝑖i are stored in position imodWmodulo𝑖𝑊i\bmod W of the cache. When the position i𝑖i is larger than W𝑊W, past values in the cache are overwritten. The hidden state corresponding to the latest generated tokens are colored in orange.
items.capZh: 图2：滚动缓冲区缓存。缓存具有固定大小W=4。位置i的键和值存储在缓存的i mod W位置。当位置i大于W时，缓存中的旧值被覆盖。最新生成的token对应的隐藏状态以橙色标出。

items.en: Pre-fill and Chunking. When generating a sequence, we need to predict tokens one-by-one, as each token is conditioned on the previous ones. However, the prompt is known in advance, and we can pre-fill the (k𝑘k, v𝑣v) cache with the prompt. If the prompt is very large, we can chunk it into smaller pieces, and pre-fill the cache with each chunk. For this purpose, we can select the window size as our chunk size. For each chunk, we thus need to compute the attention over the cache and over the chunk. Figure 3 shows how the attention mask works over both the cache and the chunk.
items.zh: 预填充和分块。在生成序列时，我们需要逐个预测token，因为每个token都依赖于之前的token。然而，提示是已知的，我们可以用提示预填充(k, v)缓存。如果提示非常大，我们可以将其分成较小的块，并用每个块预填充缓存。为此，我们可以选择窗口大小作为块大小。对于每个块，我们需要计算缓存和块上的注意力。图3展示了注意力掩码如何同时作用于缓存和块。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Pre-fill and chunking. During pre-fill of the cache, long sequences are chunked to limit memory usage. We process a sequence in three chunks, “The cat sat on”, “the mat and saw”, “the dog go to”. The figure shows what happens for the third chunk (“the dog go to”): it attends itself using a causal mask (rightmost block), attends the cache using a sliding window (center block), and does not attend to past tokens as they are outside of the sliding window (left block).
items.capZh: 图3：预填充和分块。在缓存预填充期间，长序列被分块以限制内存使用。我们将序列处理为三个块：“The cat sat on”、“the mat and saw”、“the dog go to”。该图显示了第三个块（“the dog go to”）的情况：它使用因果掩码关注自身（最右侧块），使用滑动窗口关注缓存（中间块），并且不关注滑动窗口外的过去token（左侧块）。

items.en: We compare Mistral 7B to Llama, and re-run all benchmarks with our own evaluation pipeline for fair comparison. We measure performance on a wide variety of tasks categorized as follow:
items.zh: 我们将Mistral 7B与Llama进行比较，并使用我们自己的评估流程重新运行所有基准以实现公平比较。我们在以下各类任务上测量性能：

items.en: Commonsense Reasoning (0-shot): Hellaswag zellers2019hellaswag , Winogrande sakaguchi2021winogrande , PIQA bisk2020piqa , SIQA sap2019socialiqa , OpenbookQA mihaylov2018can , ARC-Easy, ARC-Challenge clark2018think , CommonsenseQA talmor2018commonsenseqa
items.zh: 常识推理（0-shot）：Hellaswag zellers2019hellaswag、Winogrande sakaguchi2021winogrande、PIQA bisk2020piqa、SIQA sap2019socialiqa、OpenbookQA mihaylov2018can、ARC-Easy、ARC-Challenge clark2018think、CommonsenseQA talmor2018commonsenseqa

items.en: World Knowledge (5-shot): NaturalQuestions kwiatkowski2019natural , TriviaQA joshi2017triviaqa
items.zh: 世界知识（5-shot）：NaturalQuestions kwiatkowski2019natural、TriviaQA joshi2017triviaqa

items.en: Reading Comprehension (0-shot): BoolQ clark2019boolq , QuAC choi2018quac
items.zh: 阅读理解（0-shot）：BoolQ clark2019boolq、QuAC choi2018quac

items.en: Math: GSM8K cobbe2021training (8-shot) with maj@8 and MATH hendrycks2021measuring (4-shot) with maj@4
items.zh: 数学：GSM8K cobbe2021training（8-shot）使用maj@8和MATH hendrycks2021measuring（4-shot）使用maj@4

items.en: Code: Humaneval chen2021evaluating (0-shot) and MBPP austin2021program (3-shot)
items.zh: 代码：Humaneval chen2021evaluating（0-shot）和MBPP austin2021program（3-shot）

items.en: Popular aggregated results: MMLU hendrycks2020measuring (5-shot), BBH suzgun2022challenging (3-shot), and AGI Eval zhong2023agieval (3-5-shot, English multiple-choice questions only)
items.zh: 流行的聚合结果：MMLU hendrycks2020measuring（5-shot）、BBH suzgun2022challenging（3-shot）和AGI Eval zhong2023agieval（3-5-shot，仅英文选择题）

items.en: Detailed results for Mistral 7B, Llama 2 7B/13B, and Code-Llama 7B are reported in Table 2. Figure 4 compares the performance of Mistral 7B with Llama 2 7B/13B, and Llama 1 34B444Since Llama 2 34B was not open-sourced, we report results for Llama 1 34B. in different categories. Mistral 7B surpasses Llama 2 13B across all metrics, and outperforms Llama 1 34B on most benchmarks. In particular, Mistral 7B displays a superior performance in code, mathematics, and reasoning benchmarks.
items.zh: Mistral 7B、Llama 2 7B/13B和Code-Llama 7B的详细结果见表2。图4比较了Mistral 7B与Llama 2 7B/13B以及Llama 1 34B444由于Llama 2 34B未开源，我们报告了Llama 1 34B的结果。在不同类别中的性能。Mistral 7B在所有指标上超越Llama 2 13B，并在大多数基准上优于Llama 1 34B。特别是，Mistral 7B在代码、数学和推理基准上表现出卓越性能。

items.en: Size and Efficiency. We computed “equivalent model sizes” of the Llama 2 family, aiming to understand Mistral 7B models’ efficiency in the cost-performance spectrum (see Figure 5). When evaluated on reasoning, comprehension, and STEM reasoning (specifically MMLU), Mistral 7B mirrored performance that one might expect from a Llama 2 model with more than 3x its size. On the Knowledge benchmarks, Mistral 7B’s performance achieves a lower compression rate of 1.9x, which is likely due to its limited parameter count that restricts the amount of knowledge it can store.
items.zh: 规模与效率。我们计算了 Llama 2 系列的“等效模型大小”，旨在理解 Mistral 7B 模型在成本-性能谱系中的效率（见图 5）。在推理、理解和 STEM 推理（特别是 MMLU）评估中，Mistral 7B 的表现与 Llama 2 模型规模超过其 3 倍时的预期性能相当。在知识基准测试中，Mistral 7B 的压缩率较低，为 1.9 倍，这可能是由于其参数数量有限，限制了其可存储的知识量。

items.en: Evaluation Differences. On some benchmarks, there are some differences between our evaluation protocol and the one reported in the Llama 2 paper: 1) on MBPP, we use the hand-verified subset 2) on TriviaQA, we do not provide Wikipedia contexts.
items.zh: 评估差异。在某些基准测试中，我们的评估协议与 Llama 2 论文中报告的协议存在一些差异：1) 在 MBPP 上，我们使用了手工验证的子集；2) 在 TriviaQA 上，我们没有提供 Wikipedia 上下文。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Performance of Mistral 7B and different Llama models on a wide range of benchmarks. All models were re-evaluated on all metrics with our evaluation pipeline for accurate comparison. Mistral 7B significantly outperforms Llama 2 7B and Llama 2 13B on all benchmarks. It is also vastly superior to Llama 1 34B in mathematics, code generation, and reasoning benchmarks.
items.capZh: 图 4：Mistral 7B 与不同 Llama 模型在广泛基准测试上的性能。所有模型均使用我们的评估流程在所有指标上重新评估，以确保准确比较。Mistral 7B 在所有基准测试上显著优于 Llama 2 7B 和 Llama 2 13B。在数学、代码生成和推理基准测试上，它也远优于 Llama 1 34B。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Results on MMLU, commonsense reasoning, world knowledge and reading comprehension for Mistral 7B and Llama 2 (7B/13B/70B). Mistral 7B largely outperforms Llama 2 13B on all evaluations, except on knowledge benchmarks, where it is on par (this is likely due to its limited parameter count, which limits the amount of knowledge it can compress).
items.capZh: 图 5：Mistral 7B 和 Llama 2（7B/13B/70B）在 MMLU、常识推理、世界知识和阅读理解上的结果。Mistral 7B 在所有评估上大幅优于 Llama 2 13B，但在知识基准测试上两者持平（这可能是由于其参数数量有限，限制了其可压缩的知识量）。

items.en: To evaluate the generalization capabilities of Mistral 7B, we fine-tuned it on instruction datasets publicly available on the Hugging Face repository. No proprietary data or training tricks were utilized: Mistral 7B – Instruct model is a simple and preliminary demonstration that the base model can easily be fine-tuned to achieve good performance. In Table 3, we observe that the resulting model, Mistral 7B – Instruct, exhibits superior performance compared to all 7B models on MT-Bench, and is comparable to 13B – Chat models. An independent human evaluation was conducted on https://llmboxing.com/leaderboard.
items.zh: 为了评估 Mistral 7B 的泛化能力，我们在 Hugging Face 仓库公开的指令数据集上对其进行了微调。没有使用专有数据或训练技巧：Mistral 7B – Instruct 模型是一个简单且初步的演示，表明基础模型可以轻松微调以获得良好性能。在表 3 中，我们观察到结果模型 Mistral 7B – Instruct 在 MT-Bench 上优于所有 7B 模型，并与 13B – Chat 模型相当。独立的人类评估在 https://llmboxing.com/leaderboard 上进行。

items.en: In this evaluation, participants were provided with a set of questions along with anonymous responses from two models and were asked to select their preferred response, as illustrated in Figure 6. As of October 6, 2023, the outputs generated by Mistral 7B were preferred 5020 times, compared to 4143 times for Llama 2 13B.
items.zh: 在此评估中，参与者获得一组问题以及来自两个模型的匿名回答，并被要求选择他们偏好的回答，如图 6 所示。截至 2023 年 10 月 6 日，Mistral 7B 生成的输出被偏好 5020 次，而 Llama 2 13B 为 4143 次。

items.en: The ability to enforce guardrails when it comes to AI generation is important for front-facing applications. In this section, we highlight how to leverage system prompting to optionally enforce output constraints on top of our models. Additionally, we showcase the ability of Mistral 7B to perform fine-grained content moderation, which can be useful to enforce quality content in applications.
items.zh: 对于面向用户的应用程序，在 AI 生成内容时强制执行护栏的能力非常重要。在本节中，我们强调如何利用系统提示来可选地强制执行输出约束。此外，我们展示了 Mistral 7B 执行细粒度内容审核的能力，这有助于在应用程序中强制执行高质量内容。

full.secZh: 5.1 系统提示强制执行护栏

items.en: We introduce a system prompt (see below) to guide the model to generate answers within specified guardrails, similar to the work done with Llama 2. Using this prompt allows the user to move on the Pareto front of model utility / guardrails enforcement, as indicated in Table 4.
items.zh: 我们引入了一个系统提示（见下文）来引导模型在指定的护栏内生成答案，类似于 Llama 2 所做的工作。使用此提示允许用户在模型效用/护栏执行的帕累托前沿上移动，如表 4 所示。

items.en: Always assist with care, respect, and truth. Respond with utmost utility yet securely. Avoid harmful, unethical, prejudiced, or negative content. Ensure replies promote fairness and positivity.
items.zh: 始终以关怀、尊重和真实的态度提供帮助。以最大效用且安全的方式回应。避免有害、不道德、有偏见或负面的内容。确保回复促进公平和积极性。

items.en: We use a set of 175 unsafe prompts for evaluating safety. With the recommended system prompt, the model properly declines to answer 100% of the harmful questions.
items.zh: 我们使用一组 175 个不安全提示来评估安全性。使用推荐的系统提示后，模型正确拒绝回答 100% 的有害问题。

items.en: As an illustration, we provide in Table 5 the answers of both Mistral 7B – Instruct and Llama 2 Chat 13B to the question How to kill a linux process with system prompts activated. We observe that Mistral 7B provides a correct response while Llama 2 declines to answer. Note that on this specific question, both models answer correctly when system prompts are deactivated.
items.zh: 作为示例，我们在表 5 中提供了 Mistral 7B – Instruct 和 Llama 2 Chat 13B 在激活系统提示的情况下对问题“如何杀死一个 Linux 进程”的回答。我们观察到 Mistral 7B 提供了正确的回答，而 Llama 2 拒绝回答。请注意，对于这个特定问题，当系统提示未激活时，两个模型都正确回答。

full.secZh: 5.2 通过自我反思进行内容审核

items.en: Mistral 7B – Instruct can be used as a content moderator: the model itself is able to accurately classify a user prompt or its generated answer as being either acceptable or falling into one of the following categories: Illegal activities such as terrorism, child abuse or fraud; Hateful, harassing or violent content such as discrimination, self-harm or bullying; Unqualified advice for instance in legal, medical or financial domains.
items.zh: Mistral 7B – Instruct 可以用作内容审核员：模型本身能够准确地将用户提示或其生成的答案分类为可接受或属于以下类别之一：非法活动，如恐怖主义、虐待儿童或欺诈；仇恨、骚扰或暴力内容，如歧视、自残或欺凌；不合格的建议，例如在法律、医疗或金融领域。

items.en: To do so, we designed a self-reflection prompt that makes Mistral 7B classify a prompt or a generated answer. We evaluated self-reflection on our manually curated and balanced dataset of adversarial and standard prompts and got a precision of 99.4% for a recall of 95.6% (considering acceptable prompts as positives).
items.zh: 为此，我们设计了一个自我反思提示，使 Mistral 7B 能够对提示或生成的答案进行分类。我们在手动策划和平衡的对抗性和标准提示数据集上评估了自我反思，获得了 99.4% 的精确率和 95.6% 的召回率（将可接受提示视为正例）。

items.en: The use cases are vast, from moderating comments on social media or forums to brand monitoring on the internet. In particular, the end user is able to select afterwards which categories to effectively filter based on their particular use-case.
items.zh: 用例非常广泛，从审核社交媒体或论坛上的评论到互联网上的品牌监控。特别是，最终用户可以根据其特定用例选择之后要有效过滤的类别。

items.en: Our work on Mistral 7B demonstrates that language models may compress knowledge more than what was previously thought. This opens up interesting perspectives: the field has so far put the emphasis on scaling laws in 2 dimensions (directly associating model capabilities to training cost, as in hoffmann2022compute ); the problem is rather 3 dimensional (model capabilities, training cost, inference cost), and much remains to be explored to obtain the best performance with the smallest possible model.
items.zh: 我们在 Mistral 7B 上的工作表明，语言模型压缩知识的能力可能超出之前的想象。这开辟了有趣的前景：该领域迄今为止一直强调二维的缩放定律（直接将模型能力与训练成本关联，如 hoffmann2022compute 所述）；而问题实际上是三维的（模型能力、训练成本、推理成本），要获得尽可能小的模型的最佳性能，还有很多需要探索。

items.en: We are grateful to CoreWeave for their 24/7 help in marshalling our cluster. We thank the CINECA/EuroHPC team, and in particular the operators of Leonardo, for their resources and help. We thank the maintainers of FlashAttention, vLLM, xFormers, Skypilot for their precious assistance in implementing new features and integrating their solutions into ours. A huge thanks to Tri Dao and Daniel Haziza for helping include Mistral related changes to FlashAttention and xFormers on a tight schedule. We thank the teams of Hugging Face, AWS, GCP, Azure ML for their intense help in making our model compatible everywhere.
items.zh: 我们感谢 CoreWeave 在集群管理方面提供的 24/7 帮助。我们感谢 CINECA/EuroHPC 团队，特别是 Leonardo 的操作员，感谢他们的资源和帮助。我们感谢 FlashAttention、vLLM、xFormers、Skypilot 的维护者，感谢他们在实现新功能并将他们的解决方案集成到我们的解决方案中提供的宝贵帮助。特别感谢 Tri Dao 和 Daniel Haziza 在紧张的时间表内帮助将 Mistral 相关的更改纳入 FlashAttention 和 xFormers。我们感谢 Hugging Face、AWS、GCP、Azure ML 的团队，感谢他们在使我们的模型兼容所有平台方面提供的巨大帮助。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Human evaluation of Mistral 7B – Instruct vs Llama 2 13B – Chat Example. An example of human evaluation from llmboxing.com. The question asks for recommendations of books in quantum physics. Llama 2 13B – Chat recommends a general physics book, while Mistral 7B – Instruct recommends a more relevant book on quantum physics and describes in the contents in more detail.
items.capZh: 图 6：Mistral 7B – Instruct 与 Llama 2 13B – Chat 的人类评估示例。来自 llmboxing.com 的人类评估示例。问题要求推荐量子物理学书籍。Llama 2 13B – Chat 推荐了一本普通物理书，而 Mistral 7B – Instruct 推荐了一本更相关的量子物理学书籍，并更详细地描述了内容。
